children.text:
Choose the language. Some languages might not support voice.
Current language: English
Here you can switch back to your last used language.

Enable or disable voice
Engine: com.google.android.tts
Download additional languages for speech. This should be done if you use one of the languages where it is offered. Check this before using Voice for better sound quality
Load a profile (vocabulary) with categories and images. Your current profile will be lost.
Save your current profile with categories and images. You can backup them on your computer or share them with others
